sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n57808" key="klepti/dhs" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">κλεπτ-ίδης</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ου</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, Com.Patronym.of <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">κλέπτης</foreign>, <sense id="n57808.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">Son of a Thief</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0486.tlg001:219" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Pherecr.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">219</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
